---
title: "About Me"
---

### About Me

:::{#hero-heading}

Alaina Lawrence is the Business Consultant at WomenVenture and a student in the Ecosystem Science & Sustainability Professional Science Master's program at Colorado State University. Alaina has 10 years of experience in Midwestern food systems, 6 years of experience in non-profit administration, and 4 years of environment and sustainability experience.
